understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver one or more selectable pieces onto all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously in each level's grid to achieve WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs via CLICK actions on target positions [x, y]; the selected piece moves toward the clicked position if path is clear, otherwise stays put. Pieces can move back and forth between positions like [9,21] and [18,21]. Clicking a position without a clear path or on non-movable areas has no movement effect. Walls and obstacles block movement. Selection seems tied to the most recent piece interacted with. Step budget is finite per level, ending the run when depleted.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver one or more selectable pieces onto all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously in each level's grid to achieve WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs via CLICK actions on target positions [x, y]; the selected piece moves toward the clicked position if path is clear, otherwise stays put. Pieces can move back and forth between positions like [9,21] and [18,21]. Clicking a position without a clear path or on non-movable areas has no movement effect. Walls and obstacles block movement. Selection seems tied to the most recent piece interacted with. Step budget is finite per level, ending the run when depleted.
